sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111834" key="floi/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλοίω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φλέω</etym>) <sense id="n111834.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burst out, swell, be in full vigour</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bloom,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0239.tlg002:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.683f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
